offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease invoices/month, late or missing invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of lease payments and invoices.
problem: Late or missing lease invoices can lead to cash flow gaps and tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try the invoice tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing lease data
